items.title: Guardiola: Title 'is over' if Arsenal beat Man City
items.summary: Pep Guardiola has said the title race will be "over" if Manchester City lose to Arsenal this weekend.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Alcaraz, Djokovic skip Madrid Open with injuries
items.summary: Carlos Alcaraz (wrist) and Novak Djokovic (shoulder) have both pulled out of the Madrid Open because of lingering injuries.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
